title: Hierarchy Chart
description: An interactive hierarchy chart component for visualizing organizational structures, family trees, and hierarchical relationships with collapsible nodes and custom templates.

showcase.title: Hierarchy Chart Showcase
showcase.description: Interactive hierarchy chart demonstrating organizational structure and node interactions

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple hierarchy chart with organizational structure and basic configuration

sections.title: Custom Styling
sections.description: Hierarchy chart with custom styling options and visual appearance

sections.title: Interactive Features
sections.description: Hierarchy chart with click events, node toggling, and interactive tooltips

sections.title: Direction Options
sections.description: Hierarchy charts with vertical and horizontal layout directions

sections.title: Custom Templates
sections.description: Hierarchy chart with custom node templates and enhanced styling

types.title: AXHierarchyChartComponent
types.description: Hierarchy Chart Component - Interactive hierarchy chart for visualizing organizational structures and hierarchical relationships

props.name: data
props.description: Chart data input - can be a single node or array of nodes

props.name: nodeTemplate
props.description: Custom node template for rendering nodes

events.name: itemClick
events.description: Emitted when a node is clicked

events.name: nodeToggle
events.description: Emitted when a node is expanded or collapsed

methods.name: createChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Create and render the hierarchy chart
 */
createChart(): void

methods.name: updateChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Redraws the chart based on current state and options
 */
updateChart(): void

methods.name: toggleNode
methods.content:
/**
 * Toggle node expansion state
 * @param nodeId The ID of the node to toggle
 */
toggleNode(nodeId: string): void

tokens.name: --ax-comp-hierarchy-chart-node-color
tokens.description: Fill color for nodes when no custom template is used

tokens.name: --ax-comp-hierarchy-chart-node-stroke-color
tokens.description: Stroke color for node outlines when no custom template is used

tokens.name: --ax-comp-hierarchy-chart-link-color
tokens.description: Color for the connection lines between nodes

tokens.name: --ax-comp-hierarchy-chart-text-color
tokens.description: Text color for labels and other text content

tokens.name: --ax-comp-hierarchy-chart-bg-color
tokens.description: Background color for the chart area

types.title: AX_HIERARCHY_CHART_CONFIG
types.description: Default configuration token providing effective AXHierarchyChartOption values

props.name: direction
props.description: Layout direction of the hierarchy chart

props.name: nodeRadius
props.description: Radius of circular nodes in pixels

props.name: nodeStrokeWidth
props.description: Width of node stroke in pixels

props.name: linkWidth
props.description: Width of connection lines in pixels

props.name: linkStyle
props.description: Style of connection lines between nodes

props.name: nodeWidth
props.description: Width of rectangular nodes in pixels

props.name: nodeHeight
props.description: Height of rectangular nodes in pixels

props.name: nodeSpacingX
props.description: Horizontal spacing between nodes in pixels

props.name: nodeSpacingY
props.description: Vertical spacing between nodes in pixels

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltip on hover

props.name: expandAll
props.description: Whether to expand all nodes by default

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in ms
